title: ferray-linalg: no batched solve/inv/det — only cholesky has batched variant
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's linalg functions automatically handle stacked (batched) arrays: np.linalg.solve(A_batch, b_batch) where A has shape (..., M, M) and b has shape (..., M). All functions in numpy.linalg support this via umath_linalg gufunc machinery. ferray-linalg has batch.rs infrastructure (apply_batched_2d, apply_batched_scalar) and cholesky_batched/det_batched, but solve, inv, pinv, lstsq, qr, svd, eig, eigh, eigvals, eigvalsh, matrix_rank, cond, slogdet, matrix_power all only accept 2D arrays. Add batched variants or make the main functions accept IxDyn and auto-dispatch to batched mode for 3D+ inputs.
